## Meeting Purpose

[Review content performance and align on the upcoming roadmap.](https://fathom.video/share/eDx2dUFUfyVQasixzGmwCwbhnPT-74BK?tab=summary&timestamp=110.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Strong Performance:** Last week saw exceptional traffic growth (e.g., California content up 2000%), with this week's trajectory already outperforming the prior period.](https://fathom.video/share/eDx2dUFUfyVQasixzGmwCwbhnPT-74BK?tab=summary&timestamp=110.0)
  - **SERP Dominance:** A \~2-month-old "Brock Services" article now ranks \#1 for its keyword and appears in Google's AI Overviews, validating the long-term strategy.
  - [**New Content Blockers:** "Birth injury" topics are on hold pending an ICP check with sales/Pedro. Content on "case management integrations" is also paused until the features are live to avoid pre-announcing.](https://fathom.video/share/eDx2dUFUfyVQasixzGmwCwbhnPT-74BK?tab=summary&timestamp=308.0)
  - [**High-Value Opportunity:** A new "Demand Letter Editor" feature is a prime content opportunity, leveraging existing high-traffic demand-related articles.](https://fathom.video/share/eDx2dUFUfyVQasixzGmwCwbhnPT-74BK?tab=summary&timestamp=684.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance & Strategy

  - [**Traffic Growth:** Last week's performance was exceptional; this week's trajectory is already ahead of the prior period, confirming a strong upward trend.](https://fathom.video/share/eDx2dUFUfyVQasixzGmwCwbhnPT-74BK?tab=summary&timestamp=110.0)
  - **SERP & AI Overviews:** The "Brock Services" article (published \~2 months ago) now ranks \#1 for its keyword and appears in Google's AI Overviews, providing direct links.
  - [**LLM Referrals:** Early data shows a mix of traffic from ChatGPT, Claude, and Microsoft, with referral sources fluctuating weekly.](https://fathom.video/share/eDx2dUFUfyVQasixzGmwCwbhnPT-74BK?tab=summary&timestamp=222.0)
      - [A dedicated session will be held to review this data once more volume is available.](https://fathom.video/share/eDx2dUFUfyVQasixzGmwCwbhnPT-74BK?tab=summary&timestamp=222.0)
  - [**Content Reviews:** Two articles are awaiting review; three more MedMal pieces are ready for submission.](https://fathom.video/share/eDx2dUFUfyVQasixzGmwCwbhnPT-74BK?tab=summary&timestamp=74.0)

### New Content Opportunities & Blockers

  - [**"Birth Injury" Topics:** On hold pending an ICP check with sales/Pedro.](https://fathom.video/share/eDx2dUFUfyVQasixzGmwCwbhnPT-74BK?tab=summary&timestamp=308.0)
      - [**Rationale:** To confirm alignment with Tavrn's target customer profile and assess sensitivity.](https://fathom.video/share/eDx2dUFUfyVQasixzGmwCwbhnPT-74BK?tab=summary&timestamp=336.0)
  - [**"Case Management Integrations" Content:** Paused until features are live.](https://fathom.video/share/eDx2dUFUfyVQasixzGmwCwbhnPT-74BK?tab=summary&timestamp=397.0)
      - [**Rationale:** To avoid pre-announcing features and manage customer expectations.](https://fathom.video/share/eDx2dUFUfyVQasixzGmwCwbhnPT-74BK?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
      - [**In-Progress Integrations:** Filevine, Neos, and Litify are planned for the coming months.](https://fathom.video/share/eDx2dUFUfyVQasixzGmwCwbhnPT-74BK?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [**"Electronic Signatures" Content:** Not a current priority.](https://fathom.video/share/eDx2dUFUfyVQasixzGmwCwbhnPT-74BK?tab=summary&timestamp=532.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Tavrn processes documents with signatures but does not offer a built-in signature workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/eDx2dUFUfyVQasixzGmwCwbhnPT-74BK?tab=summary&timestamp=532.0)
  - [**"Demand Letter Editor" Feature:** A high-value opportunity.](https://fathom.video/share/eDx2dUFUfyVQasixzGmwCwbhnPT-74BK?tab=summary&timestamp=684.0)
      - [**Function:** A new tool allowing customers to customize demand letters via free-text commands.](https://fathom.video/share/eDx2dUFUfyVQasixzGmwCwbhnPT-74BK?tab=summary&timestamp=684.0)
      - [**Significance:** Solves a key customer pain point—the need for manual, specific edits—and leverages existing high-traffic demand-related content.](https://fathom.video/share/eDx2dUFUfyVQasixzGmwCwbhnPT-74BK?tab=summary&timestamp=684.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Kellie:**](https://fathom.video/share/eDx2dUFUfyVQasixzGmwCwbhnPT-74BK?tab=summary&timestamp=279.0)

      - [Confirm with sales/Pedro if "birth injury" topics align with the ICP.](https://fathom.video/share/eDx2dUFUfyVQasixzGmwCwbhnPT-74BK?tab=summary&timestamp=308.0)
      - [Provide details on the "Demand Letter Editor" feature from engineering.](https://fathom.video/share/eDx2dUFUfyVQasixzGmwCwbhnPT-74BK?tab=summary&timestamp=684.0)
  - [**Matt:**](https://fathom.video/share/eDx2dUFUfyVQasixzGmwCwbhnPT-74BK?tab=summary&timestamp=308.0)
      - [Resend the Slack message with the "birth injury" case list.](https://fathom.video/share/eDx2dUFUfyVQasixzGmwCwbhnPT-74BK?tab=summary&timestamp=308.0)
